title: Golden Smoky Portuguese Chicken Bowl
description: A resinous and crisp Portuguese dish featuring smoke hot flavors and whipping cream, served in an earthenware bowl. This paleo friendly meal is perfect for a nostalgic dinner.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a small bowl, mix together the smoked paprika, garlic powder, salt, and black pepper.
Rub the spice mixture all over the chicken breast, making sure to coat it evenly.
Heat the olive oil in a large oven safe skillet over medium high heat.
Sear the chicken breast for 5 minutes on each side, then transfer the skillet to the preheated oven.
Bake the chicken for 20 minutes, or until it reaches an internal temperature of 165 degrees Fahrenheit.
While the chicken is cooking, whip the heavy cream in a bowl until it forms stiff peaks.
Once the chicken is done, let it rest for 5 minutes before slicing it into thin strips.
To assemble the bowls, place a portion of the sliced chicken in the bottom of an earthenware bowl, then top with a dollop of whipped cream and a sprinkle of chopped parsley.
